response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software experience but C++ work is limited to a single ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015. Recent roles (Google, Meta, RIDE, Sociomantic) center on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and data services, with no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443 SDL practices, MQTT, or industrial protocols required for this role. Fit for a Senior C++ Manager role in automation machinery is very weak despite a strong general engineering background.
strengths: Deep full-stack and distributed-systems experience including low-latency, high-throughput services at Sociomantic
Demonstrated mentorship and teaching ability through workshops, dojos, and Selenium course design
Solid software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testable architecture
concerns: C++/STL experience is minimal and over a decade old; no recent hands-on C++ delivery
No evidence of IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity exposure
No background in industrial automation, MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or message-broker-based industrial systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general senior engineering and distributed-systems track record
